label: LED
description: Light-emitting diode. Emits light proportional to current.

over_current.message: LED burned out from too much current. Always use a current-limiting resistor in series. R = (Vsupply - Vforward) / Imax

reverse_voltage.message: Either the LED is installed backwards or the power supply polarity is reversed. The LED's anode (+) should be connected to the positive rail, and the cathode (–) to the negative rail. If the LED is oriented correctly, check that the + and – connections from the power supply haven't been swapped.
